results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Raw risk score combining impact and likelihood
results.question: Calculate raw_risk score for each asset by combining raw_impact and raw_likelihood with appropriate weighting
results.sql: SELECT a.asset_id, (SUM(a.raw_impact * 0.7) + SUM(a.raw_likelihood * 0.3)) AS raw_risk_score FROM assets AS a GROUP BY a.asset_id;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw risk score by combining raw impact and raw likelihood with appropriate weighting.

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Bastion impact score for bastion devices
results.question: Create a calculated column for bastion_impact that calculates impact score specifically for bastion host devices using impact_class and propagation_class
results.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (rim_prop.numeric_score * 1.3) + (rim_impact.numeric_score * 0.2) > 100 THEN 100 ELSE (rim_prop.numeric_score * 1.3) + (rim_impact.numeric_score * 0.2) END AS bastion_impact FROM assets a LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_impact ON rim_impact.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND rim_impact.code = a.impact_class LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_prop ON rim_prop.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND rim_prop.code = a.propagation_class WHERE a.is_bastion_device = TRUE;

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric scores for impact class and propagation class from risk_impact_metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_impact ON rim_impact.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND rim_impact.code = impact_class LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_prop ON rim_prop.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND rim_prop.code = propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate bastion impact using the formula that applies specific weights to the scores.

calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN bastion_impact > 100 THEN 100 ELSE bastion_impact END AS bastion_impact
